title: US offers $10 million for info on group behind Signal and WhatsApp hacking spree
summary: The US government is offering a $10 million reward for information on Russian state-sponsored groups conducting a hacking campaign against Signal and WhatsApp. This operation has been ongoing since March and represents a significant cybersecurity threat.
content: Operation by two Russia-state groups has been ongoing since at least March.

zh.title: 美国为Signal和WhatsApp黑客活动提供1000万美元悬赏
zh.summary: 美国政府为俄罗斯政府赞助的黑客组织对Signal和WhatsApp的黑客活动提供1000万美元悬赏。该行动自3月份以来一直在进行，代表了一个重大的网络安全威胁。

title: South Korea to spend $1T on more memory chip production and humanoid robots
summary: South Korea plans to invest $1 trillion in expanding memory chip manufacturing and developing humanoid robots, aiming to establish a commercial humanoid robot market by 2028. This investment underscores the country's strategic focus on leading in AI hardware.
content: South Korea targets physical AI lead and commercial humanoid robots by 2028.

zh.title: 韩国将投入1万亿美元用于内存芯片生产和人形机器人
zh.summary: 韩国计划投入1万亿美元用于扩展内存芯片制造和开发人形机器人，目标是在2028年前建立商业人形机器人市场。这项投资突显了该国在人工智能硬件方面的战略重点。

title: T-Mobile is booting customers from its oldest plans
summary: T-Mobile is retiring legacy plans dating back to the 3G era, affecting thousands of customers who will be migrated to modern rate plans. The move comes as T-Mobile consolidates its network after the Sprint merger and optimizes for 5G services.
content:
Time to say goodbye to that legacy Sprint plan. | Image: Alex Castro / The Verge	

Earlier today, T-Mobile started notifying customers that it will be retiring many legacy plans and moving subscribers onto one of its current rate plans. This move includes plans that date back to the 3G era, and it's going about as well as you'd expect.
Affected customers began sharing screenshots of the text on reddit and Threads this morning, and T-Mobile's chief marketing officer Allan Samson confirmed the news to The Verge: 
We're retiring our oldest plans, some of which were built nearly 15 years ago - in the 3G and 4G eras, and well before our 5G network was fully deployed. Customers will transition to modern plans that provide acc …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: T-Mobile将停用其最古老的套餐计划
zh.summary: T-Mobile正在停用可追溯到3G时代的遗留套餐，影响数千名将被迁移到现代套餐的客户。此举是T-Mobile在Sprint并购后整合网络并针对5G服务进行优化的一部分。

title: After a great start, DC’s new cinematic universe is already slowing down
summary: After the successful launch of Superman, Warner Bros.' plans to fast-track a Supergirl feature have hit a snag as critics pan the film. This slowdown suggests challenges in James Gunn's ambitious vision to rebuild DC's cinematic universe.
content:
While Kara Zor-El's appearance at the end of James Gunn's Superman was a very pleasant surprise, Warner Bros. Discovery's plan to fast-track a standalone Supergirl feature always felt a little dubious. It seemed odd that, after Superman, the studio wanted to flesh out its new cinematic universe with films about another Kryptonian and one of Batman's less notable villains. But Gunn implored fans to have faith in his vision and trust that the DCU would become a world of interconnected stories that put WBD's last batch of comic book movies to shame.
Though hopes were high for Supergirl, the movie has turned out to be a bit of a dud. Critics ha …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在良好的开局之后，DC的新电影宇宙已经开始放缓
zh.summary: 在超人成功上映之后，华纳兄弟加快推进《超级少女》电影的计划遇到了障碍，因为评论家对这部电影的评价很差。这种放缓表明詹姆斯·古恩雄心勃勃的DC电影宇宙重建计划面临挑战。

title: Chamath Palihapitiya raises $135M Series A for his AI coding startup, takes CEO role
summary: Chamath Palihapitiya has secured $135 million in Series A funding for his AI coding startup and is taking on the CEO role. The raise underscores continued investor enthusiasm for AI-powered development tools.
content: VCs remain thirsty to fund AI coding startups. This one, founded by investor Chamath Palihapitiya, is no exception.

zh.title: Chamath Palihapitiya为他的AI编码初创公司融资1.35亿美元A轮，担任CEO
zh.summary: Chamath Palihapitiya为他的AI编码初创公司获得了1.35亿美元的A轮融资，并担任首席执行官。这笔融资凸显了投资者对AI驱动开发工具的持续热情。

title: Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos reportedly wound up on the dark web
summary: iPhone 18 Pro images and component specifications have surfaced on the dark web following a breach at Tata Electronics, an Apple supplier. The leak reveals design details including a three-camera setup ahead of the phone's official announcement.
content:
The iPhone 17 Pro. | Image: The Verge	

Leaked iPhone 18 Pro photos and parts lists appeared on the dark web following a data breach affecting one of Apple's key suppliers, according to a report from Reuters. The leaked images show a drop test of what a source tells Reuters is the iPhone 18 Pro, equipped with a three-camera layout and Apple logo.
This comes just a week after Tata Electronics, an India-based company that manufactures iPhone components and assembles the devices, confirmed that it suffered a data breach. Security researchers told Reuters at the time that the ransomware group, World Leaks, posted more than 200,000 files related to the breach on the dark web. The leak …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 泄露的iPhone 18 Pro照片据称出现在暗网上
zh.summary: iPhone 18 Pro的图像和组件规格在苹果供应商塔塔电子公司发生数据泄露后出现在暗网上。该泄露在手机官方发布前透露了设计细节，包括三摄像头设置。

title: Gemini’s personalized AI image generation is now free for US users
summary: Google is expanding free access to Gemini's personalized AI image generation for US users, enabling the chatbot to create images based on user interests and connected Google app data. This move makes advanced AI image tools more accessible to the general public.
content: Google is expanding Gemini’s personalized AI image generation to eligible free users in the U.S., allowing the chatbot to create images based on your interests and data from connected Google apps.

zh.title: Gemini 个性化 AI 图像生成现在向美国用户免费开放
zh.summary: Google 正在扩大向美国用户免费提供 Gemini 个性化 AI 图像生成功能，使聊天机器人能够根据用户兴趣和连接的 Google 应用数据创建图像。此举使先进的 AI 图像工具更容易被公众使用。

title: US renewable boom passes key milestone in April
summary: US renewable energy sources generated nearly three times more electricity than coal in April, marking a significant milestone for clean energy adoption. Small-scale solar installations played a key role in achieving this record-breaking month.
content: Small-scale solar helped renewables hit nearly triple coal's generation in the US.

zh.title: 美国可再生能源在四月份突破关键里程碑
zh.summary: 美国可再生能源在四月份产生的电力几乎是煤炭的三倍，标志着清洁能源采用的重大里程碑。小规模太阳能装置在创造这个破纪录的月份中发挥了关键作用。

title: Supreme Court ruling guts government’s use of geofence warrants
summary: The Supreme Court has issued a ruling that severely limits the government's ability to use geofence warrants in investigations, though it stopped short of declaring them unconstitutional. The decision represents a significant win for digital privacy advocates.
content: SCOTUS falls short of deeming geofence warrants unconstitutional, though.

zh.title: 最高法院裁定严格限制政府使用地理围栏搜查令
zh.summary: 美国最高法院发布了一项裁定，严格限制政府在调查中使用地理围栏搜查令的能力，尽管该裁定未宣布其违宪。该裁决对数字隐私倡导者来说是一场重大胜利。

title: Tidal won’t pay royalties on AI-generated music but isn’t banning it outright
summary: Tidal will stop paying royalties on 100% AI-generated music starting immediately and will label such tracks with an icon from July 15th. The platform aims to protect human artists while maintaining openness to AI music rather than implementing an outright ban.
content:
Tidal shared its new policies regarding AI-generated music today and how the platform plans to "protect artists" and "inform listeners." Instead of banning it outright, starting on July 15th Tidal will label tracks it has identified as being 100 percent AI-generated with an icon. But starting today those tracks will no longer be monetizable. "Tidal's priority is ensuring royalties go to original works directly produced, written, and performed by people. We will therefore not knowingly attribute royalties to music we identify as wholly AI-generated," the company's announcement reads. 
The platform didn't specify what tools it's using to iden …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Tidal不为AI生成的音乐支付版税，但不会完全禁止
zh.summary: Tidal将立即停止为100%由AI生成的音乐支付版税，并将从7月15日起用图标标记此类曲目。该平台旨在保护人类艺术家，同时保持对AI音乐的开放态度，而不是实施全面禁止。

title: Sony’s next-gen PlayStation will go ‘beyond the living room’
summary: Sony has hinted that its next-generation PlayStation will support gaming beyond the traditional living room setup, potentially including a handheld device. The strategy aims to recapture players who migrated to PC gaming during the pandemic.
content:
There are already a few ways to play PlayStation games on the go, but Sony is also rumored to be working on a new handheld. | Photo by Antonio G. Di Benedetto / The Verge	

Sony hinted in a recent Q&A with investors that the next generation PlayStation will offer some kind of experience that lets you play games outside of your living room.
Here's the relevant portion from the transcript, emphasis mine:
Q: How can you bring back to the PlayStation platform users who migrated to gaming PCs during the COVID period? In aiming for profit growth, are there limitations on what can be done in the short term, or do you see the potential for more significant changes with the next-generation platform?
A: PlayStation has long been strongly associated with the idea of playing in the living room. However, in recent yea …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 索尼下一代PlayStation将超越客厅
zh.summary: 索尼暗示其下一代PlayStation将支持超越传统客厅设置的游戏，可能包括手持设备。该策略旨在重新吸引在疫情期间迁移到PC游戏的玩家。

title: Sony erases digital content from libraries; we're reminded we don’t own what we buy
summary: Sony continues to wind down its digital store, removing content from user libraries and highlighting the broader issue of digital ownership in the streaming age. The move serves as a reminder that purchasing digital content doesn't guarantee permanent access.
content: Sony has been scaling down its digitial store for a few years.

zh.title: 索尼从库中删除数字内容；我们被提醒不拥有购买的内容
zh.summary: 索尼继续逐步关闭其数字商店，从用户库中删除内容，突出了流媒体时代数字所有权的更广泛问题。此举提醒人们购买数字内容并不保证永久访问权。

title: Watch out, Amazon: The Kobo eReader now has a Goodreads rival
summary: Kobo eReaders can now sync directly with StoryGraph, a Goodreads competitor that tracks reading progress and statistics. This integration challenges Amazon's dominance in the digital reading ecosystem.
content: Kobo users can now automatically sync their reading progress to StoryGraph, making it easier to track books, reading stats, and challenges without relying on Amazon’s Goodreads.

zh.title: 小心，亚马逊：Kobo 电子书阅读器现在有 Goodreads 的竞争对手
zh.summary: Kobo 电子书阅读器现在可以直接与 StoryGraph 同步，StoryGraph 是 Goodreads 的竞争对手，可以跟踪阅读进度和统计数据。这种集成挑战了亚马逊在数字阅读生态系统中的主导地位。

title: Ozone loss was a thing even before CFCs were widely used
summary: Ozone depletion occurred before CFCs became widespread, suggesting the problem could have been detected in the 1950s using modern scientific instruments. This research provides new insights into the history of atmospheric chemistry.
content: With today’s scientific tools, the problem could have been spotted in the 1950s.

zh.title: 氯氟烃广泛使用之前，臭氧损耗就已经存在了
zh.summary: 氯氟烃成为广泛使用之前就发生了臭氧耗损，这表明使用现代科学仪器可能在 1950 年代就能发现这个问题。这项研究为大气化学的历史提供了新的见解。

title: OpenAI is teasing new hardware… for Codex
summary: OpenAI is launching a new hardware device for its Codex AI coding tool on July 15th, developed in partnership with Work Louder, a maker of mechanical keyboards and macro pads. The device will bring programmable shortcuts to developers working with the AI coding platform.
content:
OpenAI is releasing some sort of device related to its AI-powered coding tool, Codex, on July 15th. In a video posted to X on Monday, OpenAI shows a square-shaped device with several buttons, alongside the caption, "Your favorite Codex shortcuts are getting an upgrade."
This isn't the mysterious AI-powered device OpenAI is working on with former Apple designer Jony Ive, however. As shown in the teaser, OpenAI is launching the device in partnership with Work Louder, a company that sells an array of mechanical keyboards and macro pads with mappable keys, dials, and switches.
The silhouette of the device shown by OpenAI looks a bit like Work  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: OpenAI 正在为 Codex 展示新硬件...
zh.summary: OpenAI 将在 7 月 15 日为其 Codex AI 编码工具推出一个新硬件设备，该设备由机械键盘和宏键盘制造商 Work Louder 合作开发。该设备将为使用 AI 编码平台的开发人员带来可编程快捷方式。

title: Waymo and Uber quietly part ways in Phoenix
summary: Waymo and Uber have ended their partnership in Phoenix after nearly three years of collaboration. The move marks a significant shift in their autonomous vehicle strategies in the region.
content: The companies confirmed to TechCrunch that their unusual partnership in Phoenix recently ended after nearly three years..

zh.title: Waymo和Uber在凤凰城悄然分手
zh.summary: Waymo与Uber结束了他们在凤凰城近三年的合作伙伴关系。这一举措标志着两家公司在该地区自动驾驶汽车战略的重大转变。

title: Google warns EU's plans to weaken its monopoly could expose user data
summary: Google has warned that EU regulations requiring it to share search data with competitors and open AI on Android pose significant privacy risks. The dispute highlights the tension between competition enforcement and data protection.
content: The EU wants Google to share search data with competitors and open up AI on Android, but Google alleges major privacy risks.

zh.title: 谷歌警告欧盟削弱其垄断地位的计划可能暴露用户数据
zh.summary: 谷歌警告称，欧盟要求其与竞争对手共享搜索数据并在Android上开放AI的监管措施可能带来重大隐私风险。这一争议凸显了反垄断执法与数据保护之间的矛盾。

title: Anthropic and Gov. Newsom forge deal allowing California government to use Claude at half price
summary: Anthropic has partnered with California Governor Newsom to provide Claude AI services to state government at 50% discount. The deal represents Anthropic's expansion into government partnerships while potentially creating tension with federal administration officials.
content: As Anthropic forges a closer relationship with the state of California, the federal government has made an enemy out of the OpenAI rival.

zh.title: Anthropic与加州州长纽森达成协议 加州政府可半价使用Claude
zh.summary: Anthropic与加州州长纽森合作，向州政府提供Claude AI服务，享受50%折扣。该协议代表Anthropic进入政府合作领域的拓展，同时可能与联邦政府官员产生紧张关系。

title: South Korean tech giants commit over $550B to ease ‘ RAMageddon’
summary: South Korea's leading memory chip manufacturers are investing over $550 billion to address the global memory shortage constraining AI development. This massive investment aims to position South Korea as a key AI technology hub.
content: The world's two largest memory chip companies vow to build more memory lab fabs as South Korea positions itself as an AI tech powerhouse country.

zh.title: 南韩科技巨头承诺投入5500多亿美元以缓解"内存危机"
zh.summary: 南韩领先的存储芯片制造商正在投入5500多亿美元，以解决制约AI发展的全球存储短缺问题。这笔巨大投资旨在将南韩定位为关键的AI技术中心。

title: Quantum computing startup says it will leapfrog everybody
summary: A quantum computing startup claims it will surpass competitors, though achieving this would require a substantial leap from any existing hardware. The announcement underscores the speculative nature of quantum computing development timelines.
content: But the system would require a massive leap from any of its existing hardware.

zh.title: 量子计算初创公司称将超越所有竞争对手
zh.summary: 一家量子计算初创公司声称将超越竞争对手，但实现这一点需要在现有硬件基础上取得重大突破。这一声明强调了量子计算发展时间表的投机性质。

title: At $499, Apple’s M3-powered iPad Air is a good deal
summary: Best Buy is offering the 128GB iPad Air with M3 chip and cellular connectivity for $499, down from its regular $749 price. The deal compares favorably to both the base iPad and the newer M4 Air model.
content:
The iPad Air supports Apple Pencil Pro, plus hover support. | ﻿Photo: Antonio G. Di Benedetto, The Verge	

Most of Apple’s price increases have gone into effect, resulting in iPads and other products costing hundreds more than they did a few days ago. If last week’s Prime Day sale wasn’t a good time to consider buying an iPad, we found a deal worth considering that’s just under $500 right now. The 128GB iPad Air that has the M3 processor, plus both Wi-Fi and 5G cellular support, costs $499 at Best Buy. At just $50 more than the base iPad (now $449, up from $349), it’s a significantly faster and all-around better tablet.
11-inch iPad Air M3
The last-gen 11-inch iPad Air features Apple’s fast M3 chip with GPU upgrades like dynamic caching for smoother performance in demanding apps. It also supports the Apple Pencil Pro and the newest Magic Keyboard, which features a larger build and a 14-key function row. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $749 $499 at Best Buy (128GB, Wi-Fi + 5G)

While the last-gen Air matches the base iPad’s 11-inch screen size, the Air has a laminated, antireflective coating, plus a wider color gamut. In other words, it’s the better choice for entertainment or for creating content. In terms of specs, its M3 processor leaps ahead of the A16 with more cores, not to mention Apple Intelligence support (as well as support for iPadOS 27 coming later this year). It also boasts Apple Pencil Pro support.
It stacks up well compared to the newer M4 Air, too, which now starts at $749 for the Wi-Fi model, and a whopping $899 for the cellular. The M3 processor is only slightly slower, it has 8GB of memory instead of 12GB, and its wireless radio is older, but it’s otherwise nearly identical, for much less money. $500 for the M3 Air is a steal.
Read our iPad Air (M3) review.

zh.title: 苹果M3 iPad Air售价499美元是个不错的交易
zh.summary: Best Buy现在以499美元的价格提供配备M3芯片和蜂窝连接的128GB iPad Air，低于其常规价格749美元。这个交易与基础iPad和更新的M4 Air型号相比都很有竞争力。

title: Kalshi sues Illinois over new tax on prediction market sports bets
summary: Prediction market platform Kalshi is suing Illinois over a new tax on sports betting through its markets. The lawsuit escalates the regulatory battle over how prediction markets should be treated under state law.
content: Illinois now a key battleground in fight over prediction market sports bets.

zh.title: Kalshi因预测市场体育投注新税起诉伊利诺州
zh.summary: 预测市场平台Kalshi因伊利诺州对其市场上的体育投注征收新税而起诉伊利诺州。这场诉讼加剧了关于预测市场如何根据州法律规定的监管争议。

title: Arena, the AI leaderboard everyone uses, is now a $100M business
summary: Arena, which operates the widely-used free AI model leaderboard, has reached a $100 million valuation following its commercial service launch last September. The milestone reflects growing demand for AI benchmarking and evaluation services.
content: The startup, which runs a popular free AI leaderboard, launched its commercial service just last September.

zh.title: Arena这个被广泛使用的AI排行榜现已成为一个1亿美元的业务
zh.summary: Arena运营着被广泛使用的免费AI模型排行榜，在去年9月推出商业服务后达到了1亿美元的估值。这个里程碑反映了对AI基准测试和评估服务日益增长的需求。

title: Cursor now has a mobile app for guiding your coding agent on the go
summary: Cursor has released a mobile app that allows developers to monitor and control their AI coding agents remotely. The app extends Cursor's functionality beyond desktop environments for on-the-go oversight.
content: Cursor has launched a new mobile app for remote oversight over coding agents.

zh.title: Cursor现在有一个移动应用来指导你随时随地的编码代理
zh.summary: Cursor发布了一款移动应用，允许开发者远程监控和控制他们的AI编码代理。该应用将Cursor的功能扩展到桌面环境之外，用于随时随地的监督。

title: Trump administration threatens 92 GW of new electricity supply with red tape
summary: Trump administration regulatory actions are jeopardizing 92 gigawatts of planned new electricity capacity and $121 billion in solar and wind power investments. Solar and wind currently represent the largest sources of new U.S. power generation capacity.
content: The Trump administration's moves threaten $121 billion in new solar and wind power, two energy sources that are the biggest contributors to new capacity in the U.S.

zh.title: 特朗普政府用监管措施威胁92吉瓦的新电力供应
zh.summary: 特朗普政府的监管行动正在危害92吉瓦的计划新电力容量和121亿美元的太阳能和风能投资。太阳能和风能目前是美国新增电力容量的最大来源。

title: The best July 4th sales we found so far
summary: The Verge highlights July 4th sales across retailers including Best Buy, Amazon, and REI, with notable discounts on tech and outdoor gear. Featured deals include the iPad Air M3 at $499 and the LG C5 OLED TV at significant markdowns.
content:
The Govee Uplighter in action. | Image: Govee	

July 4th sales are typically a precursor to what we’d see during a mid-July Prime Day, but obviously things are flipped around this year. Last week’s big Prime Day sale is over, yet there are a number of familiar deals still poking around in the week leading up to the nation’s birthday. Best Buy is hosting its own 4th of July sale, for example. And, if you’re on the hunt for tech and gear for the outdoors, REI is hosting a sale on products that will last through the week. There are even some Apple deals you can get, some of which are selling at pre-price hike levels.
We’ll be logging the best July 4th sales we find this week below, keeping the list updated with notable discounts as we spot them.
Baseus AM52 power bank (with built-in cable)
Through June 30th, Verge readers can get a low price on the best, fastest Qi2 10,000mAh power bank around. This AM52 features a built-in USB-C cable and a soft-touch MagSafe-ready magnet.

Where to Buy:

 $79.99 $42.99 at Amazon (w/ code THEVERGECODE)

Asus ROG Falcata
The Falcata is stuffed with features (wired / wireless connectivity, split ergo design, Hall effect customization), and it’s a bargain to get it all at Best Buy’s 4th of July pricing. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $349.99 $214.99 at Best Buy

11-inch iPad Air M3
The last-gen 11-inch iPad Air comes with Apple’s M3 chip and GPU upgrades. It’s available in dark gray, blue, purple, and a “starlight” cream shade. Read our review.

Where to Buy:

 $749 $499 at Best Buy (128GB, Wi-Fi + LTE)

LG C5 OLED TV
LG’s C5 features a 120Hz panel, along with four HDMI 2.1 ports and support for both AMD FreeSync Premium and Nvidia G-Sync. The gamer-friendly TV also packs all the hallmarks of a modern OLED, including deep black levels and sublime contrast.

Where to Buy:

 $2699.99 $1099.99 at Amazon (65-inch)
 $1999.99 $1099.99 at Best Buy (65-inch)

Apple AirTags (second-generation)
Apple’s latest AirTag features an upgraded ultra-w

zh.title: 我们迄今为止找到的最佳七月四日促销活动
zh.summary: The Verge 强调了包括百思买、亚马逊和 REI 等零售商的七月四日促销，科技和户外装备有显著折扣。精选优惠包括 iPad Air M3 售价 499 美元和 LG C5 OLED 电视的大幅降价。

title: TIDAL cracks down on AI music by cutting off monetization
summary: TIDAL is implementing measures to combat AI-generated music by blocking monetization and removing songs that impersonate artists using automated detection tools. The move reflects music industry concerns about AI-generated content and artist impersonation.
content: In addition, TIDAL will use automated tools to remove AI-generated music that attempts to impersonate an artist or a group, the company said.

zh.title: TIDAL通过断绝变现来打击AI音乐
zh.summary: TIDAL正在采取措施打击AI生成音乐,通过阻止变现和使用自动化检测工具删除冒充艺术家的歌曲来应对。这一举措反映了音乐行业对AI生成内容和艺术家冒充的担忧。

title: In major privacy win, Supreme Court rules geofence warrants are protected by privacy rights
summary: The Supreme Court has limited the use of geofence warrants, ruling that privacy rights protect against their broad application. While privacy advocates sought an outright ban, the decision represents a significant victory for digital privacy protections.
content: The Supreme Court's decision to limit geofence warrants is a win for privacy advocates, who called their use unconstitutional but sought an outright ban.

zh.title: 隐私重大胜利:最高法院裁定地理围栏搜查令受隐私权保护
zh.summary: 美国最高法院限制了地理围栏搜查令的使用,裁定隐私权保护免受其广泛应用。虽然隐私倡导者寻求完全禁止,但该决定代表了对数字隐私保护的重大胜利。

title: F1 in Austria: Starts off exciting, then goes the opposite way
summary: The Austrian Grand Prix featured dramatic early racing action followed by changing conditions, with heatwave impact and engine upgrades generating interest. The event also showcased power level adjustments for the next two seasons.
content: A heatwave, engine upgrades, plus power levels for the next two seasons.

zh.title: F1奥地利站:开局刺激,随后风云突变
zh.summary: 奥地利大奖赛以戏剧性的早期赛车行动开始,随后条件改变,热浪影响和引擎升级引起了关注。该赛事还展示了未来两个赛季的动力级别调整。

title: WhatsApp now lets you reserve usernames
summary: WhatsApp is allowing users to reserve custom usernames between 3 and 35 characters long. The feature provides a way for users to establish consistent identities on the messaging platform.
content: WhatsApp username can be between 3 to 35 characters.

zh.title: WhatsApp现在让您保留用户名
zh.summary: WhatsApp允许用户保留3至35个字符的自定义用户名。该功能为用户提供了在消息平台上建立一致身份的方式。

title: WhatsApp is launching usernames: here’s how to reserve yours
summary: WhatsApp is introducing usernames allowing users to chat without sharing their phone numbers, launching later this year. The feature enables users to keep their phone numbers hidden from non-contacts and can be reserved starting this week.
content:
You can reserve the username you want to use before the feature starts rolling out later this year. | Image: Meta / WhatsApp	

WhatsApp is introducing a new way to add and chat with contacts, without having to share your phone number. Usernames will launch "later this year," in a move to make the communications platform "even more private," allowing you to keep your phone number concealed from people who aren't already in your contacts.
Usernames are available to reserve starting this week, giving you time to claim a specific handle you may already be using elsewhere before the WhatsApp username feature officially launches. The username launch will be rolling out gradually over the coming months, and users will be notified when the feature is available in their cou …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: WhatsApp 正在推出用户名：以下是如何预留您的用户名
zh.summary: WhatsApp 正在推出用户名，允许用户无需共享电话号码即可聊天，将在今年晚些时候推出。该功能使用户能够对非联系人隐藏其电话号码，并可从本周开始预留。

title: Lawmakers want to ban AI companies from selling your health data
summary: Senator Elizabeth Warren and Representative Mary Gay Scanlon are introducing an updated Health and Location Data Protection Act to prevent AI companies and data brokers from selling Americans' health and location data. The expanded bill addresses data sharing practices by AI chatbots and other modern platforms.
content:
A new proposal would ban the sale of Americans' health and location information to data brokers - including information people reveal to an AI chatbot like ChatGPT or Claude. 
In the coming weeks, Senator Elizabeth Warren (D-MA) and Representative Mary Gay Scanlon (D-PA) are planning to debut a new version of the Health and Location Data Protection Act that's better suited to the AI era. The former version of the bill, first introduced in June 2022, prohibited data brokers from collecting and selling health and location data. Four years later, it's expanded to ban other companies from selling such data to brokers, and to specifically cover  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 议员希望禁止人工智能公司出售您的健康数据
zh.summary: 参议员伊丽莎白·沃伦和众议院代表玛丽·盖伊·斯坎伦正在推出更新的《健康和位置数据保护法》，以防止人工智能公司和数据经纪人出售美国人的健康和位置数据。该扩展法案解决了人工智能聊天机器人和其他现代平台的数据共享做法。

title: Wildwood featurette lifts the veil on building its stop-motion world
summary: A new featurette for 'Wildwood' reveals the filmmaking process behind its stop-motion animation world. Director Travis Knight, known for the Oscar-nominated 'Kubo and the Two Strings,' leads the project.
content: Director Travis Knight is also the creative mind behind 2016's Oscar-nominated Kubo and the Two Strings.

zh.title: Wildwood特辑揭开了构建其定格动画世界的面纱
zh.summary: 《Wildwood》的新特辑揭示了其定格动画世界背后的电影制作过程。导演特拉维斯·奈特（以奥斯卡提名的《库博和两根魔弦》而闻名）领导了该项目。

title: In a bold move, Rocket Lab acquires Iridium Communications
summary: Rocket Lab has announced the acquisition of satellite communications company Iridium Communications, with executives calling it transformative for the space industry. The deal consolidates satellite communications and launch capabilities under one company.
content: "We believe this will be one of the most transformative deals in the space industry."

zh.title: 火箭实验室大胆收购铱星通讯公司
zh.summary: 火箭实验室宣布收购卫星通讯公司铱星通讯，高管称这对太空产业具有变革性。该交易将卫星通讯和发射能力整合在一家公司旗下。

title: Think tank games out how to respond to disaster scenarios in space warfare
summary: A think tank is modeling response protocols for disaster scenarios in potential space warfare conflicts. The analysis explores critical questions about proportional reactions and escalation thresholds in space domain conflicts.
content: "Where does the threshold live that an action necessitates some proportional reaction?"

zh.title: 智库模拟太空战争灾难场景应对方案
zh.summary: 一家智库正在为潜在太空战争冲突中的灾难场景建立应对协议模型。该分析探讨了关于太空域冲突中相称反应和升级阈值的关键问题。

title: Rocket Lab continues buying spree by acquiring satellite company Iridium
summary: Rocket Lab is acquiring satellite communications company Iridium in an all-stock deal valued at $8 billion, strengthening its competitive position against Amazon and SpaceX. The acquisition marks the latest in a series of strategic purchases by the launch provider.
content: The all-stock deal values Iridium at $8 billion and gives Rocket Lab even more firepower to compete against Amazon and SpaceX.

zh.title: 火箭实验室继续并购热潮，收购卫星公司铱星
zh.summary: 火箭实验室以全股票方式收购卫星通信公司铱星，交易价值80亿美元，增强了其对抗亚马逊和SpaceX的竞争地位。此次收购是该发射服务提供商战略性购买的最新举措。

title: Robot hand company settles Tesla trade secret suit and announces $11M raise
summary: Robotics startup Proception has settled a trade secret lawsuit with Tesla and secured an $11 million funding round. The company is developing innovative approaches to training data collection for robotic hand manipulation, one of robotics' hardest problems.
content: The startup, Proception, is taking a unique approach to collecting training data to tackle one of the hardest problems in robotics: hands.

zh.title: 机器人手公司与特斯拉和解商业秘密诉讼并获1100万美元融资
zh.summary: 机器人创业公司Proception已与特斯拉和解商业秘密诉讼，并获得1100万美元融资。该公司正在开发创新方法来收集机器人手臂操纵的训练数据，这是机器人技术最具挑战的问题之一。

title: Comcast is splitting its media and broadband properties
summary: Comcast is spinning off NBCUniversal and Sky into separate independent companies. The restructuring separates the company's media operations from its telecommunications business.
content: NBCUniversal and Sky will be spun off into separate companies.

zh.title: 康卡斯特正在分拆其媒体和宽带业务
zh.summary: 康卡斯特正在将NBCUniversal和Sky分拆成独立的公司。这次重组将公司的媒体业务与电信业务分离。

title: Pocket raises $11M in bet on rising demand for AI note-taking devices
summary: Pocket has raised $11 million in funding for its AI-powered note-taking device, a $129 credit card-shaped puck that attaches to smartphones. The device offers unlimited recordings, transcriptions, and to-do item management, positioning itself in the growing market for AI-enabled productivity hardware.
content: Pocket sells a $129, credit card-shaped puck, which sticks to the back of your phone, and promises unlimited recordings, transcriptions and to-do items.

zh.title: Pocket获得1100万美元融资,看好AI笔记设备市场需求
zh.summary: Pocket为其AI驱动的笔记设备获得1100万美元融资,这款设备形似信用卡,售价129美元,可附加到智能手机上。该设备提供无限录音、转录和待办事项管理功能,在不断增长的AI生产力硬件市场中占据一席之地。

title: Flipper Device’s new Busy Bar is a customizable display for productivity
summary: Flipper Devices has launched the Busy Bar, a customizable productivity display designed to reduce workplace distractions and improve focus. The device will retail for $249.
content: Flipper Device's new Busy Bar will retail for $249.

zh.title: Flipper设备推出新款Busy Bar,可定制生产力显示屏
zh.summary: Flipper Devices推出了Busy Bar,这是一款可定制的生产力显示屏,旨在减少工作场所干扰并提高专注力。该设备的零售价为249美元。

title: Omen AI’s plan to optimize data centers is all wet
summary: Omen AI secured $31 million in Series A funding to develop technology for monitoring data center chip coolant systems and preventing bacterial contamination. The startup aims to optimize data center operations and reduce infrastructure failures.
content: Omen AI raised a $31 million Series A to monitor chip coolant and stop bacterial outbreaks in data centers.

zh.title: Omen AI的数据中心优化计划前景可观
zh.summary: Omen AI获得3100万美元A轮融资,开发用于监控数据中心芯片冷却液系统和防止细菌污染的技术。该初创公司旨在优化数据中心运营并减少基础设施故障。

title: The Flipper Zero creators’ Busy Bar productivity display will go on sale next month
summary: The Busy Bar from Flipper Zero creators will launch on July 14th with three pricing tiers: $179 for waitlist customers, $199 for the first 3,000 units, and $249 regular retail. The pixelated LED display device is designed to signal focus time and reduce workplace distractions.
content:
The Busy Bar makes it obvious to others when you don’t want to be distracted. | Image: Flipper Devices	

First announced over a year ago in April 2025, the Busy Bar will be available for purchase starting on July 14th when the device also starts shipping. Created by the same team behind the Flipper Zero wireless multitool, the Busy Bar is instead described as a "productivity multitool" that relies on a pixelated LED display to help reduce distractions and improve focus. The first 3,000 units purchased on July 14th will be discounted to $199, but the Busy Bar will normally retail for $249. Those who previously joined the Busy Bar waitlist will still be able to purchase one next month for $179.
The Busy Bar looks a lot like an alarm clock, but i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Flipper Zero 创建者的 Busy Bar 生产力显示屏将于下月上市
zh.summary: Flipper Zero 创建者推出的 Busy Bar 将于 7 月 14 日发布，分为三个价格等级：等候名单客户为 179 美元，前 3,000 个单位为 199 美元，常规零售价为 249 美元。这款像素化 LED 显示设备旨在表示专注时间并减少工作场所的干扰。

title: How to end a TV show
summary: Mystery-packed television series often struggle to deliver satisfying conclusions after building complex narratives, as exemplified by shows like Lost and the MGM Plus series From. The challenge of resolving multiple plot threads while meeting viewer expectations remains a significant hurdle for showrunners.
content:
Ending any story is hard, but that's especially true of mystery-packed TV shows. Series like Lost initially hook viewers with constantly building secrets and questions, to the point that they can often seem incomprehensible. But the promise is that it will all pay off in the end - a feat that few shows ultimately manage. This creates tension as viewers try to put all of the pieces together while hoping that the show's creators know what they're doing in the long run. The latest example is From on MGM Plus, a Lost-style horror series that just wrapped up its penultimate season, with a fifth and final one coming in 2027. Naturally, endings are …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如何结束一部电视剧
zh.summary: 充满神秘的电视连续剧在构建复杂叙事后往往难以提供令人满意的结局，如《Lost》和 MGM Plus 剧集《From》所示。在解决多条情节线索同时满足观众期望方面存在的挑战仍然是编剧面临的重大障碍。

title: Comcast is splitting in two
summary: Comcast announced plans to split into two publicly traded companies, separating its profitable broadband and wireless business from its media assets including NBCUniversal and Sky. The separation is expected to be completed within approximately one year, with shareholders receiving shares in both resulting companies.
content:
Comcast has announced plans to separate itself into two publicly traded companies, spinning off its NBCUniversal and Sky broadcasting arms. The shake up aims to protect the media conglomerate's profitable broadband and wireless brand, which will retain the "Comcast" company name, as its media and entertainment business - now collectively named "NBCUniversal" - faces increasing pressure from industry consolidation and streaming rivals.
The separation is expected to take approximately a year, with Comcast shareholders owning shares in both Comcast and NBCUniversal upon completion. While current Comcast CEO Brian L. Roberts will be "actively i …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 康卡斯特正在分裂成两家公司
zh.summary: 康卡斯特宣布计划分裂成两家上市公司，将其盈利的宽带和无线业务与包括 NBCUniversal 和 Sky 在内的媒体资产分开。预计分离将在大约一年内完成，股东将获得两家公司的股票。

title: The war against ‘woke’ could end US science as we know it
summary: A new federal policy proposal containing language attacking "woke" policies poses a potential threat to scientific research and the careers of thousands of U.S. scientists. The policy changes could have far-reaching implications for the scientific community and national research competitiveness.
content:
A sneaky rule change has the potential to blow up scientific research in the United States. But there's still time to fight it.
On May 29th, the Office of Management and Budget (OMB) issued a 412-page proposal to revise federal financial assistance. The language is a combination of distinctly Trumpian attacks on "woke" policies and boring governmentese designed to make your eyes glaze over as quickly as possible. But under phrases like "providing further clarification on the regulatory status of the OMB requirements" is something darker - a threat to scientific research in this country, the livelihoods of thousands of scientists, and the li …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 反"觉醒"政策之争可能改写美国科学格局
zh.summary: 一项新的联邦政策提案中包含攻击"觉醒"政策的表述，对科学研究和数千名美国科学家的职业生涯构成潜在威胁。这些政策变化可能对科学界和国家研究竞争力产生深远影响。

title: NASA's X-59 "frankenjet" tests supersonic flight without the sonic boom
summary: NASA's X-59 experimental aircraft has successfully demonstrated supersonic flight capabilities while eliminating the traditional sonic boom through advanced aerodynamic design. The breakthrough technology could enable future supersonic flights over populated areas without environmental disruption.
content: NASA’s quiet supersonic flight tests could eventually go on a national tour.

zh.title: NASA X-59"科学怪人飞机"成功进行无音爆超音速飞行测试
zh.summary: NASA X-59实验飞机通过先进的气动设计成功演示了超音速飞行能力，同时消除了传统音爆。这一突破性技术未来可能使超音速飞行在人口密集地区进行而不会造成环境干扰。
